title: PebbleCraft - Reforged
description: A modpack combining various mechanical mods together!
body:
# PebbleCraft Reforged
![Pebblecraftbanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/228dd1e185c225889a26de245819f895a2a6da9f.png)

## A lightweight Modpack with performance in mind!

Pebblecraft is a Modpack created for players who want to enjoy a more tech-focussed experience! Including but not limited to [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) [Including some add-ons], [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) and [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism). It aims to offer a nice balance between some of the most popular mods today and some new upcoming mods like [Dungeon Now Loading](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeon-now-loading), while still beeing playable!

### NOTE: There is a serverside version specifically available for you, please do not use the client version as your server, it **will crash**

## Performance

In order to make sure you can actually play this modpack we chose to add a number of optimization mods, mainly relying on [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) to get some much needed frames. We tested this pack on a suite of systems including High and Low-end computers.

## Prominent Mods:

### Gameplay:
- **[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)** - Including Create Utilities, Ore Excavation, Bells And Whistles, etc
- **[Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)** - Including Mekanism Tools, Generators and Additions
- **[Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)** - By shartte
- [**Immersive Aircraft**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) - By Luke100000
- [**Dungeon Now Loading**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeon-now-loading) - By Hex

### Optimizations
- [**Embeddium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) - By Embeddedt (Fork of [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium))
- [**Ferritecore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - By Malte0811
- [**Out Of Sight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/out-of-sight) - By Corosus

### Note: This modpack has been tested with Forge 1.20.1 with an average of 4gb of RAM, we suggest you use the same.

## Need a server?
**Get one at [Laggless.gg]([https://ggservers.com/](https://lagless.gg/))** and use code **"CygnusMC"** for 35% off your first month!

Created By [Lunar](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtyvu7TVUBDyoTzYRH9QfrQ)
